title: Senior Software Engineer - Docplexus Digital Technologies - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Docplexus Digital Technologies - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Docplexus Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Docplexus Digital Technologies:
Docplexus Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus Digital Technologies!
